General.Name: Shapeways Holdings, Inc
General.Description: Shapeways Holdings, Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it operated as a digital manufacturing company. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Livonia, Michigan. On July 2, 2024, Shapeways Holdings, Inc., along with its affiliates, filed a voluntary petition for liquidation under Chapter 7 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Delaware.
General.Address: 12163 Globe St., Livonia, MI, United States, 48150
